name: devarena-platform
description: DevArena - A full-stack web application that aggregates developer competitions from multiple external APIs

scripts.install:all: npm install && npm install --workspace=frontend && npm install --workspace=backend
scripts.build: npm run build --workspace=frontend && npm run build --workspace=backend
scripts.test: npm run test --workspace=backend && npm run test --workspace=frontend
scripts.coverage: npm run test:coverage --workspace=backend && npm run test:coverage --workspace=frontend
scripts.lint: npm run lint --workspace=frontend && npm run lint --workspace=backend
